mapper.select:
/* ESS 수익 조회 */ select b.*, c.ess_profit_ratio as rate_per from ( select site_id, bill_yearm, avg(bdayIn_month) as bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak, sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate, sum(ewp_peak_rate) as ewp_peak_rate from ( select bill_idx, d.site_id, bill_yearm, d.meter_read_day, d.plan_type, d.plan_name, ess_profit_ratio, bdayIn_month, /* 평일일수 */ ess_dischg_off_peak, /* 경부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_dischg_mid_peak, /* 중부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_dischg_max_peak, /* 최대부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_off_peak, /* 경부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_mid_peak, /* 중부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_max_peak, /* 최대부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ 0 as pre_ess_incen, /* 예상 할인금액 */ ess_chg_incen, /* ESS충전요금할인 */ ess_dischg_incen, /* ESS방전요금할인 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, /* 실적 할인금액 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)*(ess_profit_ratio/100) as peak_rate, /* 고객 정산금액 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)-((ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)*(ess_profit_ratio/100)) as ewp_peak_rate /* EWP 정산금액 */ from tb_bill d, tb_site_set e where d.site_id = e.site_id and d.site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo }
) a group by site_id, bill_yearm ) b, tb_site_set c where b.site_id = c.site_id order by bill_yearm

/* ESS 수익 명세서 조회 */ select d.site_id, bill_yearm, d.ess_profit_ratio as rate_per, avg(bdayIn_month) as ess_bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak, sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate, sum(demand_chg_reduct) as demand_chg_reduct, sum(ess_chg_incen) as ess_chg_incen, sum(ess_dischg_incen) as ess_dischg_incen, sum(energy_chg_reduct) as energy_chg_reduct, sum(val_add_tax) as val_add_tax, sum(usg) as usg from ( select bill_idx, b.site_id, bill_yearm, b.meter_read_day, b.plan_type, b.plan_name, ess_dischg_off_peak, ess_dischg_mid_peak, ess_dischg_max_peak, bdayIn_month, ess_chg_off_peak, ess_chg_mid_peak, ess_chg_max_peak, 0 as pre_ess_incen, ess_chg_incen, val_add_tax, usg, ess_dischg_incen, energy_chg_reduct, (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)-((ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)*(ess_profit_ratio/100)) as peak_rate, demand_chg_reduct from tb_bill b, tb_site_set c where b.site_id = c.site_id and b.site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm =#{selTermTex } ) a, tb_site_set d where a.site_id = d.site_id group by site_id, bill_yearm order by bill_yearm

/* ESS 수익(day) 조회 */ select b.*, c.ess_profit_ratio as rate_per from ( select site_id, svc_stimestamp, avg(bdayIn_month) as bdayIn_month, sum(ess_dischg_off_peak) as ess_dischg_off_peak, sum(ess_dischg_mid_peak) as ess_dischg_mid_peak, sum(ess_dischg_max_peak) as ess_dischg_max_peak, sum(ess_chg_off_peak) as ess_chg_off_peak, sum(ess_chg_mid_peak) as ess_chg_mid_peak, sum(ess_chg_max_peak) as ess_chg_max_peak, sum(pre_ess_incen) as pre_ess_incen, sum(ess_incen) as ess_incen, sum(ess_chg_incen) as ess_chg_incen, sum(ess_dischg_incen) as ess_dischg_incen, sum(peak_rate) as peak_rate, sum(ewp_peak_rate) as ewp_peak_rate from ( select bill_idx, d.site_id, bill_yearm, d.meter_read_day, d.plan_type, d.plan_name, ess_profit_ratio, bdayIn_month, /* 평일일수 */ svc_stimestamp, ess_dischg_off_peak, /* 경부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_dischg_mid_peak, /* 중부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_dischg_max_peak, /* 최대부하시간대충전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_off_peak, /* 경부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_mid_peak, /* 중부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ ess_chg_max_peak, /* 최대부하시간대방전량(단위:kWh) */ 0 as pre_ess_incen, /* 예상 할인금액 */ ess_chg_incen, /* ESS충전요금할인 */ ess_dischg_incen, /* ESS방전요금할인 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen) as ess_incen, /* 실적 할인금액 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)*(ess_profit_ratio/100) as peak_rate, /* 고객 정산금액 */ (ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)-((ess_chg_incen+ess_dischg_incen)*(ess_profit_ratio/100)) as ewp_peak_rate /* EWP 정산금액 */ from tb_bill_day d, tb_site_set e where d.site_id = e.site_id and d.site_id = #{siteId } and svc_stimestamp between str_to_date(#{selTermFrom },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date(#{selTermTo },'%Y%m%d%H%i%s') ) a group by site_id, svc_stimestamp ) b, tb_site_set c where b.site_id = c.site_id order by svc_stimestamp
